price_list_id.description: The price list ID the price record is associated with.

variant_id.description: The price list with which the price record is associated. Either `variant_id` or `sku` is required.

sku.description: The SKU for the variant with which this price record is associated. Either `sku` or `variant_id` is required.

currency.description: The 3-letter country code with which this price record is associated.
